## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, technical audit findings, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Technical Audit Reveals 374 Broken Links:** A critical audit report was delivered, revealing 374 broken links and other SEO issues. Tavus will hire a contractor (e.g., via Upwork) to fix these granular issues.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**New Pillar-and-Cluster Content Strategy:** The team approved a new strategy to build authority around "Conversational AI" with a single, comprehensive pillar page and supporting cluster articles, replacing the original plan for one-off blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Content Review & Publication:** Tavus will review two calibration articles by EOW to define the brand voice and style (e.g., using sentence case for consistency). Three new articles are in production for immediate publication to start gathering SEO signals.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**ICP Doc Review is Top Priority:** The "Audience and Personas" doc, a foundational input for the AI content pipeline, requires review by Quinn within 24 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit

  - [GrowthX delivered a technical audit report detailing critical website issues.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**374 broken links:** Requires redirects to fix.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Non-indexable pages:** Need to be restored to the search index.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [**Tavus Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [Hire a contractor (e.g., via Upwork) to execute granular fixes like redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Delegate other tasks to the webmaster (Matt) or Alex.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**New Strategy: Pillar-and-Cluster Model**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [The team approved a pivot from one-off blogs to a pillar-and-cluster model to build authority around "Conversational AI."](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [**Pillar Page:** A single, comprehensive guide (\~3,000 words) targeting the high-volume keyword "conversational AI."](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Cluster Articles:** Deep-dive articles on niche topics that interlink with the pillar page.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach aligns with Tavus's brand vision ("conversation as an art and a dance") and allows for repurposing existing assets (e.g., graphics on turn-taking).](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [**Content Production Pipeline**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Calibration Articles:** Tavus to review two articles by EOW to define brand voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
          - [**Decision:** Use sentence case for all titles to maintain consistency with the website.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**New Articles:** Three new articles are in production for immediate publication.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Get content live quickly to start gathering SEO signals.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Content Review Process:** Tavus to provide direct feedback to train the AI and ensure the content is both accessible and intelligent.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### ICP Document Review

  - [The "Audience and Personas" doc is a foundational input for the AI content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [**Action Required:** Tavus must review the document with Quinn within 24 hours to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [**Goal:** Achieve an 80% match, prioritizing speed over perfection to avoid delays.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Supporting Tools

  - [**Custom GPT for Technical Docs:** Joshua is building a custom GPT trained on Tavus's technical documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Provide a single source of truth for product capabilities and competitor analysis, replacing traditional battle cards.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Joshua will share the public link by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tavus:**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [Review "Audience and Personas" doc with Quinn within 24 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Review two calibration articles by EOW to define brand voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [Hire a contractor (e.g., via Upwork) to fix 374 broken links.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Publish three new articles upon approval to begin gathering SEO signals.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Joshua:**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Share the public link to the custom GPT for technical docs by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [Stage the two calibration articles on the Tavus blog upon approval.](https://fathom.video/share/PAUyDmTfpzwoCJk3ESXyHLq7sB93gNVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
